name: Yeasted Lemon Poppy Seed Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Ensure all ingredients are at room temperature.
2. Add the ingredients in the order listed.
3. If your bread machine requires dry ingredients first, reverse the order of addition.
4. Set the machine to a basic setting with a light crust.
5. Do not use a programmable timer, as the bread contains perishable ingredients.
Adapted from a recipe in The Ultimate Bread Machine Book by Tom Lacalamita.
